allow: PowerShell(try { $p = New-Object -ComObject PowerPoint.Application; "PowerPoint OK: $\($p.Version\)"; $p.Quit\(\) } catch { "PowerPoint NOT available: $_" })

PowerShell($ppt = New-Object -ComObject PowerPoint.Application; $ppt.Visible = -1; $pres = $ppt.Presentations.Open\("C:\\magdeburg\\uni\\Software Project\\PROJECT_PRESENTATION.pptx", $true, $false, $false\); "slides: $\($pres.Slides.Count\)"; $n = 0; foreach \($s in $pres.Slides\) { if \($s.NotesPage.Shapes.Item\(2\).TextFrame.TextRange.Text.Length -gt 20\) { $n++ } }; "slides with notes: $n"; $pres.Close\(\); $ppt.Quit\(\))
